body:
Hey Elena,

Just wanted to follow up on our conversation from earlier this week — I've been thinking more about the [Verdant Grid](startups/verdant-grid) deal and wanted to make sure we're aligned before the holidays. From our side at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital), we're looking at coming in at 8% on the seed, which I believe matches what we discussed on the call, though I know your notes might reflect something slightly different. The round is penciling out at $4.2M total, and we'd want to lead if Crossbeam is comfortable co-signing that framing to the founders. Let me know if you're free for a quick call early next week — I'd rather sort out any discrepancies between our term sheets before either of us goes back to the team.

Amara
